sentence: וַיַּעַשׂ אֱלֹהִים אֶת־שְׁנֵי הַמְּאֹרֹת הַגְּדֹלִים אֶת־הַמָּאוֹר הַגָּדֹל לְמֶמְשֶׁלֶת הַיּוֹם וְאֶת־הַמָּאוֹר הַקָּטֹן לְמֶמְשֶׁלֶת הַלַּיְלָה וְאֵת הַכּוֹכָבִים

grammatical-notes.הַגְּדֹלִים: Article + Adjective mp. The great/large ones.

dictionary-meaning.לְמֶמְשֶׁלֶת: For the dominion and rule — disclosing the root 'mashal' (to rule) showing the functional authority of the regulators (Rule 21).
dictionary-meaning.הַכּוֹכָבִים: The stars (the distant points of light) — identifying the remaining stellar regulators.

main-translation: ***Then Elohim personally manufactured and accomplished the two great light-bearing regulators: the greater regulator for the dominion and rule of the day, and the lesser regulator for the dominion and rule of the night, along with the stars (the distant points of light).***

main-translation-explanation.dominion and rule: INTERNAL ADVERSARIAL TRIAL: Disclosed the functional authority implied by 'memshelet' (Rule 21).
main-translation-explanation.greater regulator / lesser regulator: Disclosed the relative scale and purpose of the objects.
main-translation-explanation.along with the stars: Captured the concluding direct object marker 'et'.

rejected-translations.reason: Thin; fails to disclose the 'dominion' (memshelet) noun-structure.
